description.value:
Category: Clan
Prerequisite: Kōsoku Clan, Level 12+
Your experience on the field has taught you one thing above all else, that as long as you never stop believing in fighting the good fight, destiny will always change to give you victory. You gain the following benefits;

  • You can receive a Will of Fire by rolling a natural 19-20 on an attack roll, ability check, or saving throw. When an allied creature in combat is Bloodied, decrease the threshold to receive a Will of Fire by -1.

  • When possess a Will of Fire in combat, you can choose to become Undefeatable, once per full rest. When you become Undefeatable, you gain the following benefits for 1 minute, until you reach 0 hit points, or fall unconscious; Once you are no longer Undefeatable, you gain 1 rank of Exhaustion.

    • Increase your Dexterity and Intelligence scores and their maximums by +4.
    • You immediately take your turn, regardless of your intiative order.
    • You are immediately cured of and become immune to any effects that would prevent chakra molding.
    • You gain the benefits of Chaos Mode. If you were already benefiting from this jutsu, you no longer counts as concentration and lasts until you are no longer Undefeatable
    • Finally, you gain an additional reaction per turn.
